_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assist in the mitigation of collection gaps.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architecture patterns, including vector store design, chunking strategies, retrieval evaluation, and hallucination mitigation approaches.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-009 (DQ, cosine: 0.336), RC-T-005 (RC, cosine: 0.325).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.357). Shared vocabulary: [mitigation]. DCWF-only terms [assist, collection, gaps] vs WIDAI-only terms [approaches, architecture, augmented, chunking, design, evaluation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.903, R=0.836). P exceeds R by 0.067 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Assist in the mitigation of collection gaps." and "Knowledge of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architecture patterns, includi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.364 ≈ STS 0.357 (gap 0.008). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [mitigation] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [mitigation]. DCWF-only: [assist, collection, gaps]. WIDAI-only: [approaches, architecture, augmented, chunking, design, evaluation].
